Re: Proposed private placement and cross‑border secondment compliance for Klongsai Renewable Public Company Limited (BXB: KSRN), internal only under SEA s. 241.
Klongsai Renewable PCL juristic person registration no. 0-8899-65012-10-3 and tax ID 0-9999-12345-66-7 are used here as draft placeholders with an invalid check digit pending confirmation by our registrar agent.
Registered office: 88/22 Moo 9, Soi Santi 4, Khet Phaya Thai, Bangkok 10400, Thailand; main line +66 2 671 9901; email legal@klongsai-renewable.co.th.
Contact: Khun Preeda Taweephol (Group Treasurer), pass port T H 9 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 (temporary issue), mobile 09-4556-2103, preeda.t@klongsai-renewable.co.th.
Payment instructions for the placement are to Kasetsamut Bank, Chid Lom branch, account 123-4-56789-0, SWIFT KSMBTHBKX99, beneficiary Klongsai Renewable PCL.
Ms. Arisa Thamwong will be seconded to Vienthale Power Co., Ltd. (Lao PDR) under the intercompany employment addendum; HR file link https://intra.klongsai-renewable.co.th/hr?emp=ARISA&ppid=th%2Fid%3D1-2222-33333-44-5.
Until the BXB filing of Form 56-1 (preliminary), the indicative coupon of 5.20% and facility tenor remain undisclosed and should be treated as inside information under SEA ss. 241–244.
Draft terms reference a bilateral facility with North Andaman Capital Ltd., Facility ID NA-TH-025-2026, and covenant headroom assumptions based on Q3 unaudited figures.
Acquisition target summary and capex schedule at https://dataroom.bxb.co.th/ksrn/pp?uid=EMP%3D414&pid=01 0 8 8 9 9 6 5 0 1 2 1 0 3; do not forward outside the Board.
Investor Relations Hotline 1100 is a public information line and does not constitute personal contact data; please keep Board numbers off any notice.
For public communications, redact sensitive PDPA items (e.g., mask pass port after TH9***567 and do not circulate national id 1-2345-67890-12-3 which is an invalid example used only for KYC testing).
Role-only action: CFO to coordinate the BXB pre-clearance, Company Secretary to compile minutes, and Treasury to align FX hedging with the facility drawdown.
Notwithstanding the outage at Plant T3, no material adverse change has occurred, and the MAC clause remains untriggered; media quotes shall rely only on already posted BXB notices.
Mailing address for couriered originals: K l o n g s a i Tower, 12/F, 77 Ratcha damri Rd., Pathum Wan, Bangkok 10331, Thailand; attention “Legal Affairs”.
For general inquiries use compliance@klongsai-renewable.co.th or +66 2 671 9901; do not use the placeholder 000-000-0000 or the generic label “Name: __________  ID No.: __________  Tel: __________”.
This memo supersedes prior drafts and is not for distribution beyond directors and designated advisors until the BXB posting is complete.
